focus_points.label: Celebrating the payments refactor win

focus_points.reason: Mentioned wanting to do more mentoring. No specific signal — could be a good moment to explore what that would look like for them.

focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in topic. Important to surface anything that might be slowing them down.
